channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 32.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live
item.description: Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham is Labour’s best chance to win next election, say members
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham is Labour’s best chance to win next election, say members

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Inside the dirty tricks campaigns trying to stop Andy Burnham in race for No 10
item.description: Inside the dirty tricks campaigns trying to stop Andy Burnham in race for No 10

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Sadiq Khan backs Starmer as he warns Labour rebels against leadership contest
item.description: Sadiq Khan backs Starmer as he warns Labour rebels against leadership contest

item.title: i Politics: Andy Burnham: The British state has a dangerous lack of accountability
item.description: Andy Burnham: The British state has a dangerous lack of accountability

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting will expose ‘human shopping trolley’ Burnham, say allies of ex-health secretary
item.description: Streeting will expose ‘human shopping trolley’ Burnham, say allies of ex-health secretary

item.title: Byline Times: Andy Burnham and Wes Streeting's Brexit Conundrum
item.description: Andy Burnham and Wes Streeting's Brexit Conundrum

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: The one I find interesting on BlueSky is people thinking Musk is profoundly evil for slashing USAID and ignoring that Starmer did the same to the British aid budget.
item.description: The one I find interesting on BlueSky is people thinking Musk is profoundly evil for slashing USAID and ignoring that Starmer did the same to the British aid budget.

item.title: BBC Politics: Chris Mason: Inside the shadow contest to be our next prime minister
item.description: Chris Mason: Inside the shadow contest to be our next prime minister
